title: Cardboard box
description: This mod will add 2 new types of boxes and the material they are made from.
body:
**📖What's this mod?**

_This mod will add 2 **_new types_** of boxes and the material they are made from🎉._ **or rather🔔**
1. Cardboard.
2. Cardboard box.
3. Sealed cardboard box.

**🎮Where can they be used?**

You can use them as **_decorations_** in your **_buildings_** 🏠 to make them even **better**! The boxes also have **storage space** for various things, although there is not much of it, but it is just right for storing a small amount 📦!



- This mod will be developed even more in the future.🏆
